content: NexusMods API: 2500/day + 100/hr personal-key limit historically; v1 docs cite higher app limits but rate-limit headers must be honored (X-RL-*), reset 00:00 GMT. Download LINKS via API require Premium; free users must initiate downloads from the website (nxm:// handoff). Third-party apps must register/get approved under API Acceptable Use Policy. NexusMods.App moved to OAuth2 login. nxm:// handler on Linux via xdg-mime / .desktop with MimeType x-scheme-handler/nxm.
